zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Hawley於1387年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾吉爾斯比時，他的父親Sir William Hawley I58歲，母親Beatrice34歲。他於1395年與Margaret de Brewse在英國林可爾史爾吉爾斯比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1412年在英國林可爾史爾享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Hawley于1387年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾吉爾斯比时，他的父亲Sir William Hawley I58岁，母亲Beatrice34岁。他于1395年与Margaret de Brewse在英国林可爾史爾吉爾斯比结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1412年在英国林可爾史爾享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hawley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost place called Hawley in Sheffield (Yorkshire). The placename derives from Old Norse haugr ‘hill, burial mound’ + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Hawley was born in 1387, in Girsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Hawley I, was 58 and his mother, Beatrice, was 34. He married Margaret de Brewse in 1395, in Girsby, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died about 1412, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Hawley est né en 1387, à Girsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Hawley I, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Beatrice, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Brewse en 1395, à Girsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1412, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Hawley 1387 in Girsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Hawley I 58 und seine Mutter Beatrice 34. Er hat 1395 in Girsby, Lincolnshire, England Margaret de Brewse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1412 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Hawley è nato il nel 1387 nel Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Hawley I, aveva 58 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Brewse nel 1395, nel Girsby, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1412, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Hawleyが1387年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアギルスビーで生まれた時，父Sir William Hawley Iは58歳，母Beatriceは34歳であった。1395年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアギルスビーでMargaret de Brewseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1412年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Hawley(이)가 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 지르스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Hawley I(은)는 58세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1395년 영국 링코실르 지르스비에서 Margaret de Brewse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1412년 영국 링코실르에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Hawley nasceu em 1387, em Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Hawley I, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Brewse em 1395, em Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1412, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Hawley родился в 1387 г. в местности гирсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Hawley I было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Brewse в 1395 г. в местности гирсби, линколншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1412 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Hawley nació en 1387, en Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Hawley I, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Beatrice, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Margaret de Brewse en 1395, en Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1412, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 26 años.
